title: Zoho v. FlexyPe ₹10 crore defamation suit: Madras High Court refuses to order takedown of LinkedIn posts
description: The Madras High Court on Wednesday refused to grant immediate interim relief to Zoho Corporation in its dispute with FlexyPE Technologies over allegedly disparaging LinkedIn posts concerning Zoho Books.Justice Senthilkumar Ramamoorthy declined Zoho’s request to have the posts removed or “screened” at this stage, observing that it was not yet clear whether the alleged discrepancies were attributable to Zoho’s software or to the payment gateway used by FlexyPe.
